privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Google Android Unscramble app from https://github.com/google-developer-training/android-basics-kotlin-unscramble-app as its data source (real, not synthetic). The Unscramble app uses Groovy-format build.gradle, not Kotlin DSL (build.gradle.kts). Critical discrepancy: metadata and task description both claim the file is 'app/build.gradle.kts', but the actual repository contains only 'app/build.gradle'. The expected suffix values ('.staging' and '-STAGING') are standard Android conventions. The staging URL endpoint cannot be independently verified.
